title: [CI:DOCS]basic networking guide
body:
created a basic networking guide for podman that outlines the common
network setups for podman.

Fixes: #8874

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

<!--

-->

> The png files all appear to be empty, is that expected? Are you planning to add a link in https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/docs/source/Tutorials.rst?

i dont know why the files appear like that. maybe images are like that?

LGTM
IDK about the images being blank, you might be right @baude.  But you'd think GitHub would at least show a size and say something like "This is an image and can't be previewed", but ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
